Main Question: What political party was the candidate who garnered a million votes during the 1920 election despite being in prison, a member of?
Sub Question: Who was the candidate that received a million votes in the 1920 election while in prison?
Ground Truth: Eugene V. Debs was the Socialist Party candidate who received 913,664 votes in the 1920 election while in prison.
